title: Kai (Kai Perez)
html:
Member of Yahir's core OSU friend group. Surname Perez confirmed in 2025 07 18 slideshow death song.

Key facts

  • Wedding-list invitee (2025 06 22 wedding list for now).
  • Funeral song picks: White Trash Heroes / Goodbye Angels by Red Hot Chili Peppers (2025 07 18 slideshow death song).
  • Member of the 2022 fantasy roster.
  • Featured in Yahir's 2022 dream blowup — dream-Yahir cuts him after dream-Andrew incident.
  • China gift in 2024 07 04 questions mega notebook — "Kai cigs and communist poster."

Open questions

  • Where based now?
  • Connection to Yahir's austin tx period?
